text:
Zazan (ザザン, Zazan) was a scorpion-like Chimera Ant Squadron Leader, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 190 who, after the death of the Chimera Ant Queen, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 214 proclaimed herself a Queen and set out to form her own colony. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 22, Chapter 224 

Appearance

Zazan was a humanoid Chimera Ant. Like the other members of her species, she had jointed hands and legs. She had long and unkempt fuchsia hair, golden eyes, purplish skin, and a large bust. On her forehead were several raised ovals, the same color as her hair, which resembled gemstones. Her long scorpion-like tail bore a red heart in the telson. She initially wore a two-piece yellow bikini-like outfit, with a larger red star on its top piece and smaller red star on its bottom piece. After announcing herself as queen, her outfit changed to a more revealing bikini-like outfit, which dropped the star and was darker in color, and a new corset. Between her first appearance and her self-declaration of being a queen, her chest increased in size, and her eyes became more slender. The halves of her limbs further away from her torso had shell-like coverings.

Personality

Zazan was one of the more disobedient Squadron Leaders, as she allowed her subordinates to kill and eat humans freely. She was confident, egocentric, power-hungry, and vain. Despite normally having an arrogant and composed attitude, she easily got furious if anything damaged her beauty, revealing a considerably violent and vengeful side of her. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 22, Chapter 228 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

Zazan is first mentioned by Cheetu, when he informs Colt that three of her grunts had been shot through the head. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 189 She makes her appearance shortly after, to rescue her subordinate Pike from Pokkle's attack by paralyzing him with her stinger. She criticizes Pike for his poor fighting technique, calling him pathetic, but compliments him for capturing a rare prey shortly after. In the Chimera Ant Nest, Peggy and Colt suggest that more research about Nen is necessary after Colt staggers from a newly-Nen-awakened Rammot's punch. Colt mentions that Zazan recently caught a rare prey, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 196 and so Peggy and Rammot approach Pig to inquire about the rare prey that Zazan's Squad recently brought in. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 197 

After the King is born, the squadron leaders gather at the nest. Cheetu points out that if the Chimera Ant Queen died, they would have no reason to remain. Hagya points out that there was already no reason, and Zazan adds that the Queen could no longer procreate. Hagya brings up the idea of them all going their own ways to become separate kings and queens, and several Chimera Ants, including Zazan, agree with him. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 214 When the ants are seen going their own ways, Zazan is seen standing atop a cliff's edge, looking at the area below. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 216 

Zazan settles down in Meteor City, where she creates her own personal nest and wreaks havoc among its residents by mutating many of them into slaves using her stinger. Half of the Phantom Troupe (Phinks, Bonolenov, Shizuku, Feitan, Shalnark, and Kalluto Zoldyck) hear of the ants and return home to check on the city. Residents there update them on the situation, and the Phantom Troupe declare that they would get rid of Zazan and her army within the day. 

At Zazan's Palace, Zazan proclaims her rulership over the city's residents to new captives. She declares that anyone who defied her would be put to death, and promises permanent residence in paradise to any chosen ones. While seated on a throne with two servants beside her, Zazan tells a new captive about how her mother's greatest failure was her inefficient method of building an army by laying eggs, and her mother's only success was giving birth to her. Two of Zazan's grunts restrain a man who begs to be killed, but Zazan instead compliments the man and stings him in his neck, mutating him into a dog-like beast. Once fully transformed, the beast kisses Zazan's left foot, as a sign of loyalty. Zazan gloats, declaring that she is the Queen and that with her Queen Shot Nen ability, she will rule the world. 

The Phantom Troupe arrive and scatter within the palace, racing each other to see who could kill Zazan first. Pike senses their movements from the webs they step on and reports to Zazan that they had split up. Zazan asks if they were strong, and after hearing Pike confirm they were, instructs him to engage them in combat as well. Concerned, Pike points out that Zazan would have no one to protect her, but Zazan reassures him that she would be fine, and suggests he capture them quicker if he was concerned about her safety. After Pike leaves, an attendant bringing clothes over asks Zazan if she was heading out to engage in combat as well. Zazan replies that her mother's one misfortune was that she never got to experience the fun of combat. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 22, Chapter 225 

While dressed in a skirt to conceal her lower half from view, Zazan comes across Feitan, who asks her where the queen was. She tells him that she is the queen, and bristles when Feitan asks if she is joking, retorting that naughty children like him deserved to be spanked. Elsewhere in the palace, Kalluto listens to the others through his ability, and decides that Feitan had found the queen. Feitan begins combat by distracting Zazan with an umbrella, but Zazan manages to react fast enough to dodge his attempt at catching her off guard. She sees Feitan's sword and asks if he likes to hide things. Feitan replies that they thought the same way, and that it was common to assume that things were hidden under clothing, having exposed her stinger by tearing off her clothes in his attack. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 22, Chapter 226 Zazan and Feitan exchange many parried blows, but Zazan eventually lands a kick on Feitan's face, mocking him and telling him to come back when he had gotten his act together. Feitan agrees and admits that he had probably gotten out of shape, but tells Zazan that she would be good practice, further annoying her. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 22, Chapter 227 Kalluto arrives, and is immediately enthralled by how fast the level of combat was compared to his own. The others make their presence known to him, by commenting that Feitan still was not at the top of his game. Feitan sheathes his sword back into his umbrella, then creates many images of himself to distract Zazan and create an opening for him to attack her from behind. Zazan reacts fast enough to grab his sword with her stinger, but starts to worry upon seeing that the others had arrived and likely defeated her men. Feitan presses a button in his umbrella and fires a projectile at Zazan, drawing blood on her temple. Despite the attack only being a scratch, Zazan loses her composure and tears off her tail, transforming into a hulking lizard-like creature as it regrows. 

As she finishes transforming, Zazan declares that she will kill Feitan, but looks up and is unable to see him. Feitan tries stabbing her through the back of her neck from above, but her skin is thick enough to shatter his sword. Feitan's surprise gives Zazan a small opening, and she uses that to knock him to the wall by hurling a small amount of aura at him. As Zazan keeps pummeling Feitan, the Phantom Troupe members begin discussing the order of combat should Feitan lose to her. Zazan eventually breaks Feitan's left arm, angering him. Feitan begins to activate his Pain Packer, and the other Phantom Troupe members begin to flee upon seeing it activate. Zazan sees Feitan's new outfit and asks herself when he changed his clothes, but dismisses the thought to prepare for her now-clearly-stronger opponent. Feitan launches his Rising Sun high into the air, incinerating Zazan. As she slowly shrivels and chars, she wonders how she could die as she was supposed to be the queen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 22, Chapter 229 

Abilities & Powers

During her time as a Squadron Leader, Zazan had authority over her underlings, which she retained and amplified after proclaiming herself queen and enslaving a great number of humans. Her leadership skills, combined with her power and the special properties of her stinger, allowed her to build a small kingdom. Like all Chimera Ants, she was stronger than ordinary humans, and showed considerable fighting skills, being able to rival Feitan in close-quarters combat and even overpower him for most of the fight. She was also fairly perceptive, realizing that Feitan was unguarded after using Ko and hurling a small quantity of aura at him. After transforming, her physical abilities and aura increased greatly, to the point that she became impervious to physical attacks. She was also adept at stealth, having managed to sneak up on Pokkle, who has exhibited considerable skill in ambushes in his own right. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 3, Chapter 24 

Poisonous Stinger: Zazan's stinger contained a neurotoxin that can incapacitate a pro-Hunter in an instant. According to Rammot, creatures stung by it normally sleep for about a month. 

Enhanced Strength: Zazan possessed a high degree of physical strength which rivaled Feitan's, the fifth strongest Phantom Troupe member in arm-wrestling. She was able to block his armed charge with her stinger, as well as to rip it off just by pulling with both hands. 

Immense Speed and Reflexes: Zazan was fast enough to match Feitan in speed before the latter warmed up. She saw through his attempt to block her vision with his umbrella and quickly spotted him as he attempted to launch a sneak attack on her, dodging his offensive, although only just barely. Her stinger attacks were at least as fast as his swordplay, and she was able to create an opening to land a kick on him. Her speed caused Kalluto to remark she was in a different league from him, as he had a hard time following her movements. Even when Feitan eventually became faster than her, Zazan managed to follow his movements and counter his slashes. 

Enhanced Durability: Even in her normal form Zazan had a very durable body, as a bullet fired at point-blank range only succeeded in putting a scratch on her face. Her stinger was able to withstand multiple hits from Feitan's sword without injury. 

Proficient Hand-to-Hand Combatant: Zazan was skilled in unarmed fighting. She deflected all of Feitan's sword strikes with her stinger without ever getting hit by a frontal attack. Her primary means of offense and defense was her venomous stinger; her proficiency at using it matching Feitan's sword skills. She was also adept at using her legs to kick the opponent should she manage to create an opening with her stinger. After the transformation, she began to attack with her arms, adopting a fighting style based on continuous, heavy punches. 

Nen

 She mastered Nen soon after her birth, to the point she could clash with a member of the Phantom Troupe and have the upper hand for a fair part of the fight, suggesting that she might have been proficient at Enhancement. She also developed two powerful Nen abilities in a very short amount of time, one of which seemed to vouch for a high degree of proficiency in Manipulation. Her ability to approach Pokkle without being sensed might mean she was capable of executing Zetsu unconsciously. After ripping off her stinger and turning into her hulking form, she threw a small quantity of aura at Feitan, showing decent skills in Emission. She apparently knew how to use Vows and Limitations to strengthen her Nen. 

Manga Appearances

Battles

Quotes

(To captured Meteor City denizens) "I am your Queen!! You will surrender!! Anyone who defies me will be put to death!! The chosen will be promised permanent residence in paradise!!" 
(To a Drudge) "My mother's one misfortune is never experiencing the fun of combat." 
(To Feitan) "Rude brats need to be punished." 
(To Feitan) "A hidden sword... You like to hide things, little boy?" 
(To Feitan) "You bastard! How dare you scar my face?!" 
(To herself) " Is this the end...? But I'm the Queen... How could... this... be?" 

Trivia

Zazan's name is likely derived from the Arabic name Zayan which means Beautiful. This would make sense since Zazan is obsessed with beauty.
Her clothes seem to be inspired of the variant of the costumes of the belly dancers of southern Morocco and with a forehead adorned with gems as often seen in Arabic and South Asian cultures.
According to the "Hunter × Hunter Manual" section found in the Yu ☆ Yu ☆ Hakusho official character book (Shueisha Jump remix), Zazan's stats are:
{| class="article-table" align="center" style="text-align:center"

|-
| style="text-align:left;" rowspan="2"|Chimera Ant arc (between NGL and Palace Invasion)

|}
Zazan is also classified as a Manipulator in both Hunter × Hunter Battle Collection and Battle All-Stars.

Intertextuality and References

Zazan resembles Zarbon from Dragon Ball. They share an obsession with outward appearances, preferring a beautiful appearance over a stronger form. After shedding their respective shells, they both become significantly more muscular, but also more hideous, with reptile-like qualities. In exchange, their power increases drastically.

Miscellaneous

Of all the known Chimera Ants Squadron Leaders, Zazan is the only female.
Zazan is the only Chimera Ant to refer to the late Chimera Ant Queen as her mother. Not even Colt, despite his immense loyalty for their creator, or Meruem, for whom his parent felt a sentiment akin to familial affection, ever referred to the Queen as such.
Zazan wears a "Shanel" skirt, which is likely a reference to the Chanel fashion brand.
